changes.summary: New BC-03 GetFutureVisionsFeedUseCase: resolves future-vision hub via getCommunityByTypeTag (inv-20), loads OB posts via PublicationService.findObPosts, enriches source communities and imageOfFuture documents, filters projects/tags, paginates feed cards.
communities.getFutureVisions delegates to createGetFutureVisionsFeedUseCase with communityService, publicationService, and documentService from ctx.

notes: Logic extracted from CommunityService.getFutureVisions (domain method retained for transitional callers). community-feed.service unchanged in this work unit; hub routing pattern aligned with GetCommunityFeedUseCase inv-20 future-vision branch. Follow-up: CommunityService.getFutureVisions may delegate to this use case.
